translations.Choose how vector similarity calculation: Choose how vector similarity calculations are performed for semantic search
translations.Choose which file types to include in th: Choose which bestand types to include in the vectorization process. Only bestands with extracted text and chunks will be processed.
translations.Choose which views to include in the vec: Choose which weergaves to include in the vectorization process. Leave empty to process all weergaves based on your configuratie.

translations.Complex queries: advanced searches with: Complex queries: Advanced searches with multiple filters, operators, and complex parameter combinations
translations.Config must be provided as an object: Configuratie moet als object worden opgegeven
translations.ConfigSets define the schema and configu: ConfigSets define the schema and configuratie for your SOLR collections. They contain field definitions, analyzers, and other search settings.
translations.Configure large language model (LLM) pro: Configure Large Language Model (LLM) providers for AI-powered features including semantic search, embeddings, and chat.
translations.Configure basic connection settings for: Configure basic connection settings for your SOLR server including authentication and network options. Use the separate ConfigSet and Collection Management dialogs to manage cores and collections.
translations.Configure how database objects are conve: Configure how database objecten are converted into vector embeddings for semantic search. Objects are directly vectorized without needing text extraction.
translations.Configure how objects are converted to t: Configure how objecten are converted to text before vectorization. These settings affect search quality and context.
translations.Configure parameters for file vectorizat: Configure parameters for bestand vectorization. This process will generate vector embeddings for all extracted bestand chunks.
translations.Configure parameters for object vectoriz: Configure parameters for object vectorization. This process will generate vector embeddings for all objecten matching your weergave filters.
translations.Configure which types of data to search: Configure which types of data to search and how many brons to retrieve
translations.Control which object views should be vec: Control which object weergaves should be vectorized to reduce API costs. Only vectorize weergaves that benefit from semantic search.
translations.Control which views and tools the AI can: Control which weergaves and tools the AI can use in this gesprek. By default, all agent capabilities are enabled.
translations.Create a new configset based on the _def: Create a new ConfigSet based on the _default template
translations.Create a new SOLR collection from an exi: Create a new SOLR collection from an existing ConfigSet
translations.Create your first AI agent to get starte: Create your first AI agent to get started.
translations.Custom API endpoint if using a different: Custom API eindpunt if using a different region
